text.message: Cmon red we need to start rolling some 7s and get these guys
Another game with 6s being non existent
Ok but now u hav road locked up
Blue I need to pop against green
need to settle the spot, then take road
You want the game to end
green can cut with a settle
He wants pop for double play
Idk why you wanted to get greedy should have just taken my wood
